mapper.select: select distinct a.brand_number as name, c.factoryNumber as factoryNumber, a.id as brandId from t_bas_brand a left join t_wx_brand_follow b on a.id = b.brand_id left join ( select a.brand_id, count(*) factoryNumber from t_wx_brand_follow a group by a.brand_id ) c on c.brand_id = a.id where a.product_cd = #{productCd} and enterprise_id = 44 and b.wx_user_id = #{userId} group by a.brand_number

select distinct a.brand_number as name, a.id as brandId, ifnull(c.factoryNumber, 0) as factoryNumber from ( select a.brand_number, a.id from t_bas_brand a left join t_wx_brand_follow b on a.id = b.brand_id where a.product_cd = #{productCd} and a.enterprise_id = 44 and a.id not in (select brand_id from t_wx_brand_follow where wx_user_id = #{userId})) a left join ( select a.brand_id, count(*) factoryNumber from t_wx_brand_follow a group by a.brand_id ) c on c.brand_id = a.id;

select x.TYPE_CODE as productCd, x.ID as productTypeId, count(distinct y.wx_user_id) as factoryNumber, ifnull(z.brandNumber, 0) as brandNumber, ifnull(k.attentedNumber, 0) as attentedNumber, x.TYPE_NAME as productName, #{userId} as userId from ( select b.* from t_bs_product_type_access a, t_bs_product_type b where a.product_cd = b.TYPE_CODE and a.enterprise_id = 44 ) x left join t_wx_brand_follow y on x.ID = y.product_type_id left join ( select a.product_cd, count(*) as brandNumber from t_bas_brand a where a.enterprise_id = 44 group by a.product_cd ) z on z.product_cd = x.TYPE_CODE left join ( select count(distinct brand_id) as attentedNumber, a.product_type_id from t_wx_brand_follow a where wx_user_id = #{userId} group by a.product_type_id ) k on k.product_type_id = x.ID group by x.TYPE_CODE, x.ID;
